posts.author: Noamz (Noam Zanger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I want to customize my team home page. Ideally we will have weekly task board that will present in everyone homepage. I do not want it to be part of specific workplace but the front page whenever you sign in.
Is it possible?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Noam,

I am afraid this isn’t currently possible. Please add your vote to the existing feature request to get this on our roadmap → Better customization + personalization of homepage
